---
title: "Effect of gender on food allergy"
subtitle:"names"
format:
  revealjs: 
    theme: blood
  typst:
    include-before-body: 
      -text:
        //something
  docx:default
execute:
  echo


---

'''{r}
gtsummary::tbl_summary(targets::tar_read(data))
''
'''{r}
gtsummary::tbl_regression(targets::tar_read(model))
''

Todays date is 'r Sys.Date*()' and it is \r format(Sys.time(), format = "%H")'
